channel.title: The Grant Desk - Visual & Media Arts, UK
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Visual & Media Arts, UK.

item.title: William Morris Art Futures Bursary - Up to £10,000 - deadline 11 May 2026
item.description:
House of Hackney, William Morris Gallery & IntoUniversity

Location: London Boroughs of Hackney and Waltham Forest, UK

Award: Up to £10,000

Duration: One-off bursary

Deadline: 11 May 2026

New bursary from House of Hackney and William Morris Gallery, in partnership with IntoUniversity, supporting the next generation of artists in the London Boroughs of Hackney and Waltham Forest. Provides up to £10,000 to 16 to 25 year olds with creative potential who face barriers to accessing education, training, materials or mentorship. Inspired by William Morris's values of art for all and the transformative power of creativity. Deadline 11 May 2026, 23:59.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).

item.title: Cubitt Curatorial Fellowship 2026-28 - £34,500 pro-rata for 3 days/week (24-month fellowship) - deadline 10 May 2026
item.description:
Cubitt Gallery

Location: London, UK (on-site Wed-Fri at 8 Angel Mews, N1)

Award: £34,500 pro-rata for 3 days/week (24-month fellowship)

Duration: 24 months (June 2026 to May 2028)

Deadline: 10 May 2026

15th edition of the Cubitt Curatorial Fellowship: a 24-month residency for one curator with in-depth contemporary-art knowledge and an interest in Cubitt's growing Civic, Education and Community programmes. The only scheme of its kind in the UK; previous fellows have gone on to lead at Glasgow International, Rijksakademie Amsterdam and Kunsthalle Wien. Three days/week (Wed-Fri) on-site, with evening/weekend work and TOIL policy. Mentorship and practical support from senior management. Application deadline 23:59 Monday 10 May 2026; interview invites 21 May; interviews 28 May.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).

item.title: XAIxArts 4: 4th International Workshop on Explainable AI for the Arts - Workshop participation (funding TBC) - Closed 23 Apr 2026
item.description:
ACM Creativity & Cognition (University of the Arts London)

Location: London, UK

Award: Workshop participation (funding TBC)

Duration: 1 day workshop, 13 July 2026

Deadline: Closed 23 Apr 2026

Call for papers, pictorials or videos for a workshop bringing together HCI, interaction design, AI, explainable AI and digital-arts researchers and practitioners to examine explainability through creative and artistic domains. Notifications 14 May 2026.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
